name: ZhiHand
description: Pair a ZhiHand Android app, chat through OpenClaw, read the latest phone screen, and send BLE-backed control commands.

controlPlaneEndpoint.label: Control Plane Endpoint
controlPlaneEndpoint.help: Base URL for the ZhiHand control plane, for example https://api.zhihand.com.

originListener.label: Origin Listener
originListener.help: Public origin metadata recorded for this OpenClaw plugin instance.

displayName.label: Display Name
displayName.help: Human-friendly plugin name shown in pairing state.

stableIdentity.label: Stable Identity
stableIdentity.help: Stable plugin identity used to reuse the same edge ID across restarts.

pairingTTLSeconds.label: Pairing TTL Seconds
pairingTTLSeconds.help: How long a generated pairing QR remains valid.

appDownloadURL.label: App Download URL
appDownloadURL.help: URL shown to users when generating the pairing QR.

gatewayResponsesEndpoint.label: Gateway Responses Endpoint
gatewayResponsesEndpoint.help: Local OpenClaw /v1/responses endpoint for the dedicated ZhiHand mobile agent.

gatewayAuthToken.label: Gateway Auth Token
gatewayAuthToken.help: Gateway bearer token used to call the local OpenClaw /v1/responses endpoint.

mobileAgentId.label: Mobile Agent Id
mobileAgentId.help: Dedicated OpenClaw agent id used for ZhiHand mobile prompts.

requestedScopes.label: Requested Scopes
requestedScopes.help: Requested ZhiHand scopes included in the pairing descriptor.
